column1: # Custom partition table for 16MB flash with OTA support (ESP32-P4)
# - Dual OTA partitions (~6.25 MB each) for safe firmware updates
# - Offsets (except nvs/otadata) must be aligned to 0x10000 (64KB)
# - The FQBN option `PartitionScheme=ota_6mb_16MB` must match this filename (without .csv)
